gap: A gen_ai tool span carries its payload in gen_ai.tool.call.arguments / gen_ai.tool.call.result, neither of which is read. A conformant tool span therefore stores an EMPTY input and output — the run is classified 'tool' correctly and then shows nothing about what the tool was asked or answered.
note: This fixture asserts the mapping we WANT, under xfail. Only instrumentors that additionally emit the OpenInference input.value/output.value pair capture anything today.
